name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. v0.9.21: Remove orchestrator tag guidance from Final Statement (agents self-assess via A-OS spectrum). v0.9.20: Anchor density reduction (1-19: 4 anchors, 1-13: 3 anchors), A-OS Exec syntax, Skeptic A-X. v0.9.19: Session 2 Skeptic-first. v0.9.18: Advocate R-axis Strategic Focus. v0.9.17: Agent Refusal Protocol. Dynamic Data Filters. Log management via cpas-manager plugin.
